title: Baladevjew Temple
tagline: Baladevjew Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Baladevjew Temple is a Hindu temple in Ichhapur (Tulasi Khetra), Kendrapara, Odisha, India.
overview.description: Baladevjew Temple is a Hindu temple in Ichhapur (Tulasi Khetra), Kendrapara, Odisha, India. Baladevjew (Balarama) is the main divinity. His siblings Jagannath and Subhadra are also worshipped in the Ratna Sinhasan (Gem Throne) in the main temple.

topPlaces.name: Nimapada
topPlaces.description: Nimapada (previously called as Nimapara) is a town and a Notified Area Council (NAC) in Puri district on the way to Konark and 40 km from the state capital Bhubaneswar in the Indian state of Odisha.

topPlaces.name: Basudeipur
topPlaces.description: Basudeipur is a village in the Gop block of Puri district, Odisha state of India.

topPlaces.name: Biratunga
topPlaces.description: Biratunga is one of the villages situated in the Gop tehsil of Puri district, Orissa, India. Biratunga is located approximately 3 kilometers away from its tehsil Gop town, 40.8 kilometers away from Puri city and 68 kilometers away from Bhubaneswar, the capital city of Orissa.

topPlaces.name: Gop, Odisha
topPlaces.description: Gop (also known as "Gope") is a Village and a Grama Panchayat in the Puri district of the Indian state of Odisha.

topPlaces.name: Ganeswarpur
topPlaces.description: Ganeswarpur is an Indian village. The village falls under the Gop block of Puri District.

topPlaces.name: Varahi Deula, Chaurasi
topPlaces.description: Barahi Deula (Odia:ବାରାହୀ ଦେଉଳ) is an ancient 10th century built temple situated on the eastern coast of Odisha in Puri district, India. The barahi temple of Chaurasi is unique in more than one way.

topPlaces.name: Lunahar
topPlaces.description: Lunahar is one of the villages situated in the Gop tehsil of Puri district, Orissa, India. Lunahar is located approximately 6 kilometers away from its tehsil Gop town, 30 kilometers (45 minutes drive) away from the city of Puri and 66 kilometers (1 hour and 30 minutes drive) away from Bhubaneswar, the capital city of Orissa.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Baladevjew Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Baladevjew Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Baladevjew Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (33 km) and the nearest railway station is Puri Railway Station (33 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Baladevjew Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Baladevjew Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Baladevjew Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Baladevjew Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Baladevjew Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nimapada, Basudeipur, Biratunga, Gop, Odisha, Ganeswarpur.
